title: Fixed "subscription_period" docstring
body:
## Description
Fixed method docstring for "subscription_period"

Python version: 3.10

OS: macOS Sonoma 14.7

## Checklist:
- Just minor change of param docstring

step_plan.summary: Fixes incorrect Sphinx/reST docstring markup for the `subscription_period` parameter in invoice-link creation wrappers so documentation generators correctly recognize and render the parameter, keeping sync and async docstrings consistent.

steps.operation: Fix Sphinx/reST parameter field markup for `subscription_period` in the sync invoice-link wrapper docstring
steps.reason: The docstring currently uses malformed Sphinx syntax (`:subscription_period:`) which prevents documentation tools (e.g., Sphinx) from recognizing and rendering `subscription_period` as a parameter; updating to `:param subscription_period:` matches the project’s established docstring convention and fixes generated docs without changing runtime behavior.
steps.side_effects: Documentation output will change (parameter will be correctly listed/rendered). No API/signature/runtime behavior changes. If the project has docstring linting or docs-build CI, it may start passing where it previously warned/failed (or vice versa if the project expected the incorrect tag).

steps.operation: Mirror the same docstring fix for `subscription_period` in the async invoice-link wrapper to keep sync/async docs aligned
steps.reason: The async wrapper is intended to be a parity equivalent of the sync wrapper; fixing the same malformed docstring field ensures consistent public documentation across both entry points and avoids confusing discrepancies for users.
steps.side_effects: Documentation output for async API will change similarly (correct parameter rendering). No runtime behavior changes. May affect any docs snapshots or doctool outputs that compare sync/async docstrings.
